headline: 3 Reasons We Love First Solar (FSLR)
summary: Although the S&P 500 is down 1.9% over the past six months, First Solar’s stock price has fallen further to $190.40, losing shareholders 13.1% of their capital. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Bear Of The Day: First Solar (FSLR)
summary: Despite the high price of oil tthis solar stock is not seeing the upside you would think it would.
